con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="PublicacaoWSService" targetNamespace="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://wspub.pj.saj.softplan.com.br/" version="1.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="efetuarLogon" type="tns:efetuarLogon"/> <xs:element name="efetuarLogonResponse" type="tns:efetuarLogonResponse"/> <xs:element name="enviarPublicacoes" type="tns:enviarPublicacoes"/> <xs:element name="enviarPublicacoesResponse" type="tns:enviarPublicacoesResponse"/> <xs:element name="enviarPublicacoesString" type="tns:enviarPublicacoesString"/> <xs:element name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse" type="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"/> <xs:element name="finalizaEnvioDiario" type="tns:finalizaEnvioDiario"/> <xs:element name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse" type="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="enviarPublicacoes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="bytes" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="efetuarLogon"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="userId" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="senha" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="string64" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:base64Binary"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:enviarPublicacoesResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <wsdl:part element="tns:finalizaEnvioDiario" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <wsdl:part element="tns:enviarPublicacoesString" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="enviarPublicacoes"> <wsdl:part element="tns:enviarPublicacoes" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="efetuarLogon"> <wsdl:part element="tns:efetuarLogon" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:efetuarLogonResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <wsdl:part element="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse" name="parameters"></wsdl:part> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="PublicacaoWS"> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoes"> <wsdl:input message="tns:enviarPublicacoes" name="enviarPublicacoes"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:enviarPublicacoesResponse" name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="efetuarLogon"> <wsdl:input message="tns:efetuarLogon" name="efetuarLogon"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:efetuarLogonResponse" name="efetuarLogonResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <wsdl:input message="tns:finalizaEnvioDiario" name="finalizaEnvioDiario"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse" name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <wsdl:input message="tns:enviarPublicacoesString" name="enviarPublicacoesString"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:enviarPublicacoesStringResponse" name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="PublicacaoWSServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:PublicacaoWS"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoes"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoes"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="efetuarLogon"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="efetuarLogon"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="efetuarLogonResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="finalizaEnvioDiario"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="finalizaEnvioDiarioResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> <wsdl:operation name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <soap:operation soapAction="" style="document"/> <wsdl:input name="enviarPublicacoesString"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output name="enviarPublicacoesStringResponse"> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="PublicacaoWSService"> <wsdl:port binding="tns:PublicacaoWSServiceSoapBinding" name="PublicacaoWSPort"> <soap:address location="https://creci-hml.sajcloud.com.br/wspubWeb/services/PublicacaoWS"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>
